title: move_to_checkpoints command
description: Move through a sequence of checkpoint positions using pathfinding.
markdownDescription: *Move* through a sequence of *checkpoint* positions using pathfinding.

prefixItems.title: move_to_checkpoints command
prefixItems.description: Move through a sequence of checkpoint positions using pathfinding.
prefixItems.markdownDescription: *Move* through a sequence of *checkpoint* positions using pathfinding.

checkpoints.title: Checkpoints
checkpoints.description: Ordered list of position targets to move through. Each entry is [map_name, tile_x, tile_y, proximity_px].
checkpoints.markdownDescription: Ordered list of position targets to move through. Each entry is `[map_name, tile_x, tile_y, proximity_px]`.

repeat.title: Repeat
repeat.description: Restart from the first checkpoint after reaching the last one. Default is false.
repeat.markdownDescription: Restart from the first checkpoint after reaching the last one. Default is `false`.

max_time_s.title: Maximum time (in sec) to complete the route
max_time_s.description: Maximum time in seconds to complete the full route. After this time the movement stops.
max_time_s.markdownDescription: Maximum time in seconds to complete the full route. After this time the movement stops.
